nasb.text: You continued looking until a stone was cut out without hands, and it struck the statue on its feet of iron and clay and crushed them.

esv.text: As you looked, a stone was cut out by no human hand, and it struck the image on its feet of iron and clay, and broke them in pieces.

cnv.text: 你正觀看的時候，有一塊非人手鑿成的石頭，擊在那座大像鐵和泥混雜的腳上，把腳砸碎了。

ccb.text: 在你观看的时候，有一块非人手凿出的石头打在塑像半铁半泥的脚上，砸碎了脚。
